_comment: IAM Permission Policy — WebRTC API Client Role
Attach to the role assumed by callers of the WebRTC Contact API
Callers obtain this role via sts:AssumeRoleWithWebIdentity using an
OIDC ID token (Cognito User Pool, Google, Auth0, etc.) or via a
Cognito Identity Pool (which calls AssumeRoleWithWebIdentity internally).
After assuming this role the client signs every HTTP request with SigV4.
The Lambda Function URL (authType=AWS_IAM) validates the signature.
<FUNCTION_URL_FQID>  Lambda Function URL FQID (shown in aws lambda
For ECS / App Runner (not Lambda), replace the lambda:InvokeFunctionUrl
statement with execute-api:Invoke on the API Gateway ARN.
